name: paila-todo
description: Paila Todo - Personal Productivity and Finance Manager

scripts.setup: npm install --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm run prisma:setup --prefix server
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix client --legacy-peer-deps && npm install --prefix server --legacy-peer-deps && npm run prisma:setup --prefix server
scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n "client,server" -c "cyan.bold,green.bold" "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server
